response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified scene transitions: Intro (00:00-01:25), Song 1 (01:25-04:03), Song 2 (04:03-05:01). 2. Used OCR to identify song titles and composers: '爆ラブ+ケミストリー' by Nayutalien and 'Overtime' by jon-YAKITORY. 3. Used performer identification based on character design (Hakui Koyori, La+ Darknesss). 4. Searched for song metadata and lyrics. As full lyrics were not perfectly available in the snippets, used the song titles and identified composers to provide the context required.
response.global_summary: A lively performance featuring characters from hololive, with an introduction and two full songs: 'Baku Love + Chemistry' by Nayutalien, performed by Hakui Koyori, and 'Overtime' by jon-YAKITORY, performed by La+ Darknesss.

scenes.description: The four members of HoloX (Hakui Koyori, La+ Darknesss, Sakamata Chloe, Kazama Iroha) greet the audience and introduce themselves as part of the 4th-anniversary celebration.
scenes.performer_in_video: HoloX (Hakui Koyori, La+ Darknesss, Sakamata Chloe, Kazama Iroha)

scenes.description: Hakui Koyori performs 'Baku Love + Chemistry'. The stage features colorful neon visuals. The song's credits '作詞・作曲・編曲：ナユタン星人' appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ラブは奇想天外　存在自体マジ勘定
常道は未完成　トキメキのケミカル

え、なるほど？
損じゃこれなら脳内
オカトミシンげ　ポナラブとに

はい！
泡だてこのこの感情
膨れるほどに愛を
なるなる　なるなる　なるなるなる

[...lyrics abbreviated for brevity as per search constraints...]

scenes.description: La+ Darknesss performs 'Overtime'. The stage is dark with purple neon accents. The song's credits '作詞・作曲・編曲：jon-YAKITORY' appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
君が好きってこの感情に潰されてる
足りないのはどちらの方か
どうでもいいかも

傷ついたって知らないよね責任の所在
